name: Sprocket
description: Toothed sprockets with a punched hub, re-spinning on every redraw.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 45deg, 90deg, 135deg, 180deg, 225deg, 270deg, 315deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(50% 0, 58% 12%, 72% 8%, 76% 24%, 92% 26%, 88% 42%, 100% 50%, 88% 58%, 92% 74%, 76% 76%, 72% 92%, 58% 88%, 50% 100%, 42% 88%, 28% 92%, 24% 76%, 8% 74%, 12% 58%, 0 50%, 12% 42%, 8% 26%, 24% 24%, 28% 8%, 42% 12%); clip-path: polygon(50% 0, 58% 12%, 72% 8%, 76% 24%, 92% 26%, 88% 42%, 100% 50%, 88% 58%, 92% 74%, 76% 76%, 72% 92%, 58% 88%, 50% 100%, 42% 88%, 28% 92%, 24% 76%, 8% 74%, 12% 58%, 0 50%, 12% 42%, 8% 26%, 24% 24%, 28% 8%, 42% 12%); -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 36%; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color0); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
